summary: ANDROID 🟥 CLOUD Unable to remove policies for VFRee 60 + device
scenario: VFree 60+ device not appearing in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list, preventing policy removal despite being visible in Inventory.
description_clean: When logging into a tenant (tenantId=6bbcc475-4c30-4939-8f09-45254946865b), the VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list, preventing users from setting or removing policies for this device. The device appears in the inventory but not in the policy management list. Users can access device settings via Inventory but can only set policies there, with no option to remove them.
steps: Navigate to Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list
Check if the VFree 60+ device is listed
Observe that the device is missing from the policy management list
Navigate to Inventory and locate the VFree 60+ device
Attempt to set a policy for the device from Inventory
Attempt to remove a policy for the device from Inventory
expected: The VFree 60+ device should appear in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list, allowing users to both set and remove policies for the device.
actual: The VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list. The device appears in Inventory where users can set policies but cannot remove them.
